hard_constraints: Do not change the ATR multiplier.
Do not open parallel redesign tracks.
objective: Run narrow execution setup to test whether holdout_profitability_borderline can be improved without materially damaging OOS.
in_scope: Layer 3 as a narrow profitability filter on the official stack.
Artifact freezing for execution setup and governance synchronization.
Evaluation strictly against the frozen baseline and decision rules.

active_hypothesis.title: Layer 3 as a narrow profitability filter on the updated official stack
active_hypothesis.rationale: This is the single approved first experiment family because it is already available in the stack, remains upstream of exit and sizing, and tests profitability tightening without changing Layer 4 or Layer 5 mechanics.

decision_rules.minimum_confirmation_rule: Holdout average return per trade must increase, holdout profit factor must increase, and holdout portfolio return must improve or at least not materially worsen.

sequencing_rules: Only one experiment family may be active at a time.
Do not combine two redesigns in a single experiment pass.
Do not activate backlog hypotheses before the active hypothesis is formally closed out.
exit_criteria: Official baseline is written explicitly and frozen.
A single active hypothesis is frozen explicitly.
Decision rules are operational and non-ambiguous.
Roadmap points directly to Layer 3 narrow profitability test as the next execution target.
No ambiguity remains in scope, sequencing, or blocked governance states.
